description: Official per-1M-token rates for every model seen in Multica runtime usage. Rates come ONLY from vendor pricing pages; each carries its source URL and capture date. cache_write is the default (5-minute) cache-write rate; cache_write_1h is kept for reference. Edit this file (or point AISTAT_PRICING_OVERRIDES at a second JSON with the same shape) to add or override models without code changes. A model that has no official public rate must be listed with "unpriced": true and a note — never priced at 0. An optional per-model "credits" block gives the OpenAI Codex rate-card credit rates (credits per 1M tokens: input / cache_read / output); when present, cost_credits is computed from it instead of the flat usd*AISTAT_CREDITS_PER_USD conversion. Claude models carry the mapped Codex-tier credit rates (Fable 5 = GPT-5.6 Sol, Opus 4.8 = GPT-5.6 Terra) per owner directive FAN-1427.
assumptions: Multica runtime usage reports four token counts per (runtime, model, day): input / output / cache_read / cache_write. input_tokens is the uncached remainder, so total cost = input*input + output*output + cache_read*cache_read + cache_write*cache_write, all per 1M tokens.

cache_write tokens are priced at the vendor's default 5-minute cache-write rate (Anthropic 1.25x input; OpenAI gpt-5.6 1.25x input). Agents use the default ephemeral (5m) cache, so the 5m rate is the correct default; the 1h rate is recorded for reference/override.
cache_read tokens are priced at the vendor cache-hit rate (Anthropic 0.1x input; OpenAI cached-input 0.1x input).

credits (OpenAI Codex rate card, https://help.openai.com/en/articles/20001106-codex-rate-card, captured 2026-07-20) are per 1M tokens and cover input / cached input (cache_read) / output only; cache_write is not part of the credit card. Credit cost = (input*credits.input + cache_read*credits.cache_read + output*credits.output) / 1e6. Codex reports cache_write_tokens=0, so this is exact for codex runtimes.

claude-opus-4-8.notes: Claude Opus 4.8. 5m cache write = 1.25x input; 1h = 2x; cache read (hit) = 0.1x input.

credits.notes: Credits billed as GPT-5.6 Terra per owner directive FAN-1427.

claude-fable-5.notes: Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic's most capable widely released model). 5m cache write = 1.25x input; 1h = 2x; cache read = 0.1x input.

credits.notes: Credits billed as GPT-5.6 Sol per owner directive FAN-1427.

claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.notes: Claude Haiku 4.5 (API ID claude-haiku-4-5-20251001). 5m cache write = 1.25x input; 1h = 2x; cache read = 0.1x input.

gpt-5.6-sol.notes: GPT-5.6 Sol. cached input (cache_read) = 10% of input; cache write = 1.25x input. Multica reports cache_write_tokens=0 for codex runtimes, so the cache-write rate does not affect current cost but is recorded for completeness.

gpt-5.6-terra.notes: GPT-5.6 Terra. cached input (cache_read) = 10% of input; cache write = 1.25x input. Multica reports cache_write_tokens=0 for codex runtimes.

gpt-5.6-luna.notes: GPT-5.6 Luna (smallest GPT-5.6 tier, used by Codex Dev Luna). cached input (cache_read) = 10% of input; cache write = 1.25x input. Multica reports cache_write_tokens=0 for codex runtimes, so the cache-write rate does not affect current cost but is recorded for completeness.
